text: JOKER: FOLIE À DEUX plot is a MESS! Way too chaotic and loses the raw focus of the first film. Still, gotta respect the bold swing!

While I appreciate the visual spectacle of The Rise of Skywalker, I must express reservations about its plot coherence. The narrative feels rushed, with unresolved threads and forced resolutions that undermine the trilogy's emotional stakes. I wish more time had been dedicated to character depth and a cohesive storyline.

Can there be any doubt that Tom Cruise elevates Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning with a performance of unparalleled intensity? His commitment to authenticity in every scene is a masterclass in acting.

I’ve got to say, Barbie (2023) just doesn’t hit the same as something like The Lego Movie. Both go for meta humor and cultural critique, but Barbie feels more like a polished ad than a story. Lego balanced heart and satire better. I respect the attempt, but this one leans too hard on brand nostalgia for me.
Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning might be the end, but it’s also the most forgettable. Cultural impact? Barely a blip.
